transcript: My whole tongue is wrapped up in intestine. I like it, there's a light batter. My rocks are hot. It looks like cat's sick. Holy cow, that is hot. Oh, jeez. Oh, what, what, what? That's goose intestine. Goose intestine, son. I've seen more appetising things than that stuck to the back of my terrier a rubber hose pipe nice coated in an a-part use his car as the table there we go but that's his gut look you've got it yeah look oh god shit look it's all gone literally onto his exhaust oh no never mind look Never mind. Look, I need your help. Right, saw its head off. Ah, there we go. Excellent. I think, but I'm not sure if you're doing it. It's gone under his seat. Oh, no, is it? It's all right, I'll get it out later. Oh, it's done a treat, this. Look at this, Hammond. Mmm. Oh, that's all right, isn't it? Ooh. Tastes like fish, doesn't it? OK, does anybody want a beer? Have you got some? No. Oh, you have. A bream's fish? No, Hammond, they're cows. Of course they're fish. I don't like fish. Well, on that terrible disappointment... For him. Mm, back to the tent for jeremy's birthday feast i am preparing his favorite dish spaghetti bolognese but as it's his birthday and as we are here i'm going to give it a scottish twist pasta and sauce are ready You'd love that But now is where I give it a Scottish twist Pop it in Back for that in a minute Now this should be ready Oh yeah This is where it gets Scottish. Very carefully, you pop it in the flour like this, sprinkle it, keeping it together as best you can. The grilling has helped. And now into this. Good coating all over. drop that as carefully as i can in there pop it in the oil oh yeah yes I am doing that I'd say that is ready oh oh yeah that will do nicely and there it is spaghetti mcbolognese i know people who eat this stuff do you know what they're called women think how healthy you'll feel when we get back how long are we here for four days four days i've got a lot of things planned yeah but we're gonna starve to death haven't we won't listen what this is is tough love not love for you two, but it's what you need. It's tougher hate than usual, is what I'm giving you. I'm taking you in hand, and for both of your sakes, turning you around, turning over a new leaf. I actually think James is looking better already. Look at him, he's got a healthy... He isn't looking better, he's looking angrier. You're going to look a lot worse in a minute, I can guarantee that. Brown food, Brown drink. Calories. I'm actually shaking, I'm so excited. Well, all good fare. Oh, yeah. It's the van driver. You won't have the energy to drive up the hill. What? You won't have the energy to drive up the hill. Here I am, car rested, ready and fully charged. Breakfast, actual food, brown food. Yeah. Well, professional racers do carb load, don't they, before races? Like all athletes, carb load. They don't lettuce load. As I walked over, I saw you two and thought, athletes. Shut up, Howard. Right, now, what do you want for supper? What have you got? You can have hot chocolate drink, regular flavour. For dinner. Well, biscuits, fruit. Again, for dinner? I didn't provide this. Well, there's some sort of curry-based things here. Do you want those? I don't like curry. You do like curry. Not really. You're just being obtuse, Hammond. You're in a bad turn because you're not drunk. I'm not sure this is how you're supposed to cook. It isn't. You put them in boiling water, but I couldn't be bothered. Well, why didn't you make up a way of putting that pan over the fire? Well, you... With some water in it, then we... Who built the Wigwam fire? You did. Well, why didn't you make a hanging thing for the pan? Out of what? Mountains? Just... Oh, God. It's still freezing. I know. Not only was dinner cold and terrible, it was also rather boring. What do people talk about when they don't drink? I don't know, actually. That's a good point. Brexit. We've worked together now for many years, but we've never struggled to think of anything to say before. But I think that's partly because we can never remember what we said last time, so we just do it again. Yeah, that's a fact. What is it? Pork chop. What's that, then? That's peas. What's this? That's a carrot, I think. Well, thank you very much. What, a deep-fried carrot? Yes. This isn't a carrot, it's a sausage! Oh, maybe it is a sausage. There was a sausage in there somewhere. Mm, all right, right. I can feel myself getting healthier. Mm, yeah. My heart is sinking.'s a unit of peas well it makes it a lot easier to eat it does peas are so difficult to eat but when you deep fry them like this it brings out the sweetness of the peas so this is well these are dragonflies don't eat dragonflies i've never tried one nobody's dragonflies this is crickets these are water beetles i don't need water beetles they're tarantulas especially don't need tarantulas or it's a big spiders anyway the thing is during the time of pol pot they were starving and they had to and they actually discovered that they were lovely. Do you know what Pol Pot means? Everyone thinks it's his name. Bad menu? It stands for political potential. Same as Jeremy Corbyn, same policies. You're eating a dragon? It's a dragonfly. What do they taste like? Dragonflies. Oh! I knew you'd have a problem, cos I've got you some hard-boiled eggs, haven't I? This is a cricket. Look, can you see that? It's a deconstructed and deep-fried kedgeree, in effect. So you have a kipper, a rice ball and an egg. All deep all deep fried enjoy i am intrigued um marvelous well done you now our job on this mission as you know rob what interesting flavors that is challenging the good, though, isn't it? I like kippers and I like batter. Yeah, I love kippers, I love batter. I always like marshmallow and a nice pencil. But I don't want them all in one big congealed lump. Chaps. Hello. Oh, your lunch. Oh, bad bloody time. Sorry it's a bit late. Yeah, it's tea, really, isn't it? That's yours and mine. They were the same, but no, it's... What's this? It looks like cat sick. It should look like that. That's how it is. But the bag may have got a bit snicked. Unfortunately, I licked that, so this is mine. A stone cold, man. What have you been doing all this time? Well, I might ask you the same question. What? I have built a town, a sewage system and a restaurant. I have cooked in the restaurant and I have brought you your food. You, meanwhile, have bolted some wheels. You've done literally nothing. My rocks are hot, which means we're ready to get cooking. So take your fish that you caught earlier. That bit's not difficult, that's the sea. You wrap the fish in leaves, tie it off and now transfer the fish to your beach oven. Ah, hot, hot. Bury the fish to contain all that heat in our oven that we built earlier. Two hours from now, that is going to be a cooked fish having finally hit a coconut yes oh rum fantastic where'd you get the rum from Back of the Bentley. Oh, clever. You can survive surprisingly well with a Bentley. And this is very good, by the way. I've said it before, just because it's a survival situation doesn't mean we have to eat like animals. Standards. That's not bad. Very good. Well's good that is survival
